label: Render node properties (swaddle)
description: Render node properties for swaddled infant rendering. Adds brightness range and color offset fields.

brightnessRange.label: Brightness range
brightnessRange.description: Range of random brightness multipliers applied to the swaddle graphic.

swaddleColorOffset.label: Swaddle color offset
swaddleColorOffset.description: RGBA color offset added to the swaddle graphic's resolved color. Format: (r, g, b, a).
